tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing planned launch June 2024

payload.description: Congestion Pricing (Central Business District Tolling Program) planned to launch in June 2024

tool_args.label: Monthly Pass Fare Pilot start July 2024

payload.description: Fare pilot promotion will start with the sale of monthly passes for July 2024

tool_args.label: Fare pilot duration at least 12 months

payload.description: Duration of fare pilot promotion would be at least 12 months and may continue until the next permanent fare change

tool_args.label: MTA Board meeting April 30, 2024

payload.description: MTA Board approval scheduled for April 30, 2024 to approve the fare promotion

tool_args.label: Discount up to 10% on monthly passes due to rounding

payload.claim_text: MTA is proposing a temporary fare pilot promotion for railroad customers for a discount up to 10% (due to rounding) on monthly passes within the city zones
payload.subject: In-City Railroads Monthly Pass Fare Pilot

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing context for the fare pilot

payload.claim_text: Congestion Pricing will encourage drivers to switch to transit (subways, buses, and railroads) into the Congestion Relief Zone and avoid the toll
payload.subject: Central Business District Tolling Program

tool_args.label: OBTA provides additional 10% discount

payload.claim_text: The funding from OBTA will provide for an additional ten percent discount on monthly fares for customers taking LIRR and MNR trips within New York City
payload.subject: Outer Borough Transportation Account (OBTA)

tool_args.label: OBTA funding subject to Public Authorities law

payload.claim_text: The agreed upon discount and funding is the result of consultation with the houses of the legislature and is subject to the requirements of subdivision 3 of Section 1270-i of the Public Authorities law and MTA Approval
payload.subject: Outer Borough Transportation Account (OBTA)
